mapper.sql: SELECT i.id, i.collection_id, i.post_id, i.user_id, i.created_time, i.importance_score, i.pinned, i.score_factors, p.category_id, COALESCE(pi.ai_tags, pi_fallback.ai_tags) AS ai_tags, COALESCE(pi.title, pi_fallback.title) AS title, COALESCE(pi.summary, pi_fallback.summary) AS summary, p.original_language FROM favorite_collection_items i JOIN favorite_collections fc ON fc.collection_id = i.collection_id JOIN posts p ON p.post_id = i.post_id LEFT JOIN post_i18n pi ON pi.post_id = i.post_id AND pi.language_code = #{languageCode} LEFT JOIN post_i18n pi_fallback ON pi_fallback.post_id = i.post_id AND pi_fallback.language_code = p.original_language WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND i.collection_id = #{collectionId} AND fc.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED'
mapper.select:
AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(pi.ai_tags, pi_fallback.ai_tags, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{tag}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(pi.title, pi_fallback.title, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{tag}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(pi.summary, pi_fallback.summary, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{tag}), '%') )
ORDER BY i.created_time DESC
ORDER BY i.pinned DESC, i.importance_score DESC, i.created_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT i.id, i.collection_id, i.post_id, i.user_id, i.created_time, i.importance_score, i.pinned, i.score_factors, p.category_id, COALESCE(pi.ai_tags, pi_fallback.ai_tags) AS ai_tags, COALESCE(pi.title, pi_fallback.title) AS title, COALESCE(pi.summary, pi_fallback.summary) AS summary, p.original_language FROM favorite_collection_items i JOIN posts p ON p.post_id = i.post_id LEFT JOIN post_i18n pi ON pi.post_id = i.post_id AND pi.language_code = #{languageCode} LEFT JOIN post_i18n pi_fallback ON pi_fallback.post_id = i.post_id AND pi_fallback.language_code = p.original_language WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT p.category_id FROM favorite_collection_items i JOIN posts p ON p.post_id = i.post_id WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' GROUP BY p.category_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(pi.ai_tags, pi_fallback.ai_tags) AS ai_tags FROM favorite_collection_items i JOIN posts p ON p.post_id = i.post_id LEFT JOIN post_i18n pi ON pi.post_id = i.post_id AND pi.language_code = #{languageCode} LEFT JOIN post_i18n pi_fallback ON pi_fallback.post_id = i.post_id AND pi_fallback.language_code = p.original_language WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND COALESCE(pi.ai_tags, pi_fallback.ai_tags) IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(pi.ai_tags, pi_fallback.ai_tags) != ''

SELECT COALESCE(pi.title, pi_fallback.title) AS title FROM favorite_collection_items i JOIN posts p ON p.post_id = i.post_id LEFT JOIN post_i18n pi ON pi.post_id = i.post_id AND pi.language_code = #{languageCode} LEFT JOIN post_i18n pi_fallback ON pi_fallback.post_id = i.post_id AND pi_fallback.language_code = p.original_language WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY i.importance_score DESC, i.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
